description_long: This object is a group of urban traffic control devices, including two red octagonal stop signs labeled 'PARE', two orange traffic cones with white reflective stripes, a yellow and orange traffic bollard, and a vertical traffic light with red, yellow, and green lenses. The stop signs are mounted on black posts and have a bold white border and text. The traffic cones are conical with a wide base for stability, while the bollard is hexagonal and stacked with reflective bands. The traffic light is rectangular, mounted on a black pole, and features three circular lenses in a vertical arrangement. All items are made from materials typical for outdoor urban use, such as plastic and metal, and are designed for high visibility. The set is commonly found at intersections, roadworks, or areas requiring traffic regulation and safety.
description: A set of urban traffic control devices including stop signs, traffic cones, a bollard, and a vertical traffic light, all designed for high visibility and road safety.
description_view_0: Front view showing all components: two stop signs, two traffic cones, a bollard, and the face of the traffic light with visible red, yellow, and green lenses.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the traffic light and bollard, with the stop signs and cones mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs and traffic light, with the hexagonal shape of the bollard and the bases of the cones visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, showing the profile of the traffic light and bollard, with the stop signs and cones partially visible.
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersection, or roadwork area
